tiles.label: OFR FSI
tiles.note: composite anchor; daily, 2-bd lag

tiles.label: Chicago Fed NFCI
tiles.note: weekly composite

tiles.label: Chicago Fed ANFCI
tiles.note: adjusted NFCI; weekly composite; detect-on-composites anchor

tiles.label: St. Louis Fed FSI (STLFSI4)
tiles.note: weekly composite; reserved freshness window, optional anchor

tiles.label: VIX
tiles.note: prices insurance, orthogonal to SPX level

tiles.label: 2s10s (T10Y2Y)
tiles.note: sign-change is the signal

tiles.label: HY OAS (BAMLH0A0HYM2)
tiles.note: OAS not HYG/LQD ETF

tiles.label: Fed Broad USD (DTWEXBGS)
tiles.note: Broad = economic gauge; DXY is EUR-story proxy

tiles.label: Copper / Gold ratio
tiles.note: clean growth read (daily copper/gold ratio supersedes monthly-copper); oil is geopolitics-contaminated

tiles.label: VIX / VIX3M
tiles.note: ratio>1.0 = backwardation = acute stress

tiles.label: Rates vol (MOVE proxy)
tiles.note: free proxy = 20d realized vol of DGS10 changes; ^MOVE delayed if licensed

tiles.label: % S&P >200DMA
tiles.note: % of S&P 500 members with closeadj > SMA200 (Sharadar SEP, data-bank-computed)

tiles.label: % S&P >50DMA
tiles.note: % of S&P 500 members with closeadj > SMA50 (Sharadar SEP, data-bank-computed)

tiles.label: % broad-US >200DMA
tiles.note: % of broad-US active common-stock universe with closeadj > SMA200 (Sharadar SEP)

tiles.label: % broad-US >50DMA
tiles.note: % of broad-US active common-stock universe with closeadj > SMA50 (Sharadar SEP)

tiles.label: 52w NH-NL (broad)
tiles.note: (52w-new-highs - new-lows) / valid-members * 100; signed net % (broad-US)

tiles.label: Net Liquidity (WALCL-TGA-RRP)
tiles.note: CONSTRUCT, not a Fed metric — context_only (see knobs.net_liquidity)

tiles.label: SOFR - IORB
tiles.note: plumbing flag driver; >25bp = stress

tiles.label: SRF take-up
tiles.note: rising off ~0 = stress

tiles.label: Stablecoin aggregate cap
tiles.note: crypto dry powder; keep small
